expect: competitions DOMAIN.md plus refreshed city-plan metrics will raise adjacency coverage from 52/53 to 53/53 and eliminate the stale 36-remaining queue
actual: Created domains/competitions/DOMAIN.md with 5 adjacency links and updated the live F-CITY1 counters in domains/city-plan/DOMAIN.md and tasks/NEXT.md. The trustworthy close-state is now 17/53 domains seeded with 75 directed edges; 36 domains still lack explicit adjacency.
diff: Expected a single missing-domain fix and clearer denominator. Actual result closed the missing competitions DOMAIN.md surface, but the city-plan file still lacked its own Adjacent header at verification time, so the stable queue is 17/53 with 36 remaining rather than the optimistic 18/53 variant.
notes: open_lane.py required --force because the bulletin board still reported a stale ACTIVE record for the already-merged DOMEX-CITY-S529 lane
Older S528 prose was left intact where it reads as historical provenance rather than live queue state
